creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
> Not long ago, CPPFLAGS support was added to bsd.port.mk. Strange
> thing, though, is that LDFLAGS support was not added along with
> it, as these two options are usually used/changed together.

For the record, the reason I had not added LDFLAGS support back
then was exactly the outfall coming out of that which was already
sufficiently big (too big nearly) for me to handle for CPPFLAGS 
and CPP along.

I always wanted to come back and also add LDFLAGS after some other
changes that seemed more urgent and am very happy and grateful that
you are taking care of it now.  Thank you!

Gerald
